name: SC - Common Side Effects (2025) (US)
plot: Former high school lab partners Marshall and Frances begin to unravel a conspiracy involving big pharma and the federal government to suppress knowledge of a rare mushroom that may hold the key to curing all the world’s diseases.
cast: Dave King, Emily Pendergast, Mike Judge, Martha Kelly, Joseph Lee Anderson

name: SC - SAKAMOTO DAYS (2025) (JP)
plot: Once the greatest hitman of all, Taro Sakamoto retired in the name of love. But when his past catches up, he must fight to protect his beloved family.
cast: Tomokazu Sugita, Nobunaga Shimazaki, Ayane Sakura, Nao Toyama, Hina Kino, Ryota Suzuki, Natsuki Hanae, Taku Yashiro

name: SC - Babanba Banban Vampire (2025) (JP)
plot: When 15-year-old Rihito falls in love, an ancient vampire who craves 18-year-old virgin blood must protect the teen's virginity at all costs.
cast: Daisuke Namikawa, Yusuke Kobayashi, Mayuko Kazama, Taku Yashiro, Akira Sekine, Katsuyuki Konishi

name: SC - Ishura (2024) (JP)
plot: A host of demigods have inherited the world after the Demon King has died, and a battle to determine the mightiest ensues.

name: SC - Invincible Fight Girl (2024) (US)
plot: Andy dreams of becoming the greatest pro wrestler of all time. Assuming the wrestler alias: "Fight Girl", Andy sets out into the bizarre and colorful Wrestling World, determined to make a name for herself.
cast: Sydney Mikayla, Rolonda Watts, Paul Castro Jr., T.K. Weaver

name: SC - My Happy Marriage (2023) (JP)
plot: Miyo's abusive family deems her worthless – but together with her powerful husband-to-be, her true self and hidden powers slowly begin to shine.
cast: Reina Ueda, Kaito Ishikawa, Ayane Sakura, Koutaro Nishiyama, Hiro Shimono, Houko Kuwashima, Ryohei Kimura

name: SC - The Seven Deadly Sins: Four Knights of the Apocalypse (2023) (JP)
plot: As a prophecy of doom unfolds on the peaceful land of Britannia, a purehearted boy sets out on a journey of discovery — and revenge.
cast: Shou Komura, Kikunosuke Toya, Aino Shimada, Kanna Nakamura, Koki Uchiyama, Rikiya Koyama, Sachi Kokuryu, Toshiyuki Morikawa

name: SC - YOLO (2020) (US)
plot: Two Australian party girls, Sarah and Rachel, looking for fun times, new experiences, positive vibes, and hopeful horoscopes in the bizarre town of Wollongong. Sarah's quest is to find love, whereas Rachel hungers for chaos, often bringing them into conflict as they encounter surreal Australiana, strange bush creatures, and eccentric nomads.

name: SC - Metalocalypse (2006) (US)
plot: Part-American, part-Scandinavian death-metal band Dethklok has a lingering effect on its fans, who take the words seriously and do anything Dethklok lyrics say. The government fears the band's influence and sets out to destroy it by covert means; for example, by sending military pharmaceutical psychotropic drug manufacturers. Deemed sociopaths for tossing hot coffee at their concert attendees, two of the band members are alcoholics, and they all have self-esteem issues.
cast: Mark Hamill, Victor Brandt, Malcolm McDowell, Brendon Small, Tommy Blacha
